feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP HANA Rev 59.16: Driving Innovation with Enhanced Performance, Security, and Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi SAP HANA Experts, 

I want to create a blog in the portala for powerful in-memory data platform, continues to evolve and play a crucial role in the digital transformation journey for businesses worldwide. The latest release, SPS 05, which reached Revision 59.16 on January 7, 2025, brings a wealth of new features and enhancements aimed at improving performance, security, cloud integration, and user experience. Let’s take a closer look at what’s new in this release and how businesses can benefit from it.

  1. Enhanced Performance and Speed

SAP HANA consistently focuses on improving its core performance, and the Rev 59.16 release continues this trend with significant advancements:

  • Optimized Query Processing: The speed of query execution has been significantly boosted, thanks to improvements in internal memory management. This ensures faster response times, even with complex workloads.
  • Improved Data Tiering: Better data tiering now allows SAP HANA to efficiently manage hot, warm, and cold data. This results in improved system performance, particularly for organizations dealing with massive volumes of data.

These enhancements ensure SAP HANA remains a high-performance solution for real-time analytics, no matter the scale or complexity of the data involved.

  1. Cloud Integration and Hybrid Enhancements

As businesses increasingly embrace hybrid and multi-cloud environments, Rev 59.16 makes it easier for SAP HANA to integrate with various cloud platforms:

  • Cloud-Native Capabilities: The release introduces enhanced cloud-native features, allowing businesses to seamlessly run SAP HANA applications both on-premise and in the cloud, offering greater flexibility.
  • SAP HANA Cloud Integration: Stronger integration tools simplify bridging on-premise SAP HANA with SAP HANA Cloud, creating a smoother hybrid cloud experience and enabling efficient management of data across multiple environments.

These features support a more unified, efficient, and scalable cloud experience for businesses managing their data in a hybrid or multi-cloud infrastructure.

  1. Security Improvements

SAP HANA Rev 59.16 prioritizes enhanced security, addressing the growing concerns around data protection and compliance:

  • Enhanced Data Encryption: Stronger encryption features have been introduced to safeguard sensitive data both in transit and at rest. This ensures that businesses meet stringent security and compliance standards, particularly in industries with high data sensitivity.
  • Stronger Authentication: The system now supports a wider array of authentication protocols, improving access control and security for both users and services interacting with SAP HANA.

These security upgrades ensure that SAP HANA remains a trusted platform for businesses dealing with highly sensitive data and regulatory requirements.

  1. AI and Machine Learning Integration

SAP HANA has also made significant strides in integrating AI and machine learning capabilities, making it easier for businesses to harness the power of advanced analytics:

  • Streamlined AI Integration: The new release enhances integration with AI and machine learning frameworks, enabling businesses to run predictive models directly on their SAP HANA data. This reduces the time between data collection and actionable insights, allowing organizations to make smarter decisions faster.
  • Graph Data Processing: The expansion of graph data processing allows businesses to analyze complex relationships within their data more effectively. This feature is especially valuable in sectors like finance and telecommunications, where understanding intricate data relationships is critical.

These capabilities enable organizations to leverage the full potential of their data and unlock deeper insights using AI and machine learning.

  1. Improved Application Development

For developers working on SAP applications, Rev 59.16 introduces several new tools and features aimed at improving the development experience:

  • New Development Frameworks: The release includes additional development frameworks designed to speed up the application lifecycle, helping developers build and deploy applications more efficiently.

Thanks,

Divya Sahukari

entry.title: Rollingup data for a Dimension in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to rollup data in SAP Analytics cloud, based on complaint number, i have to concatenate the code values.

 I couldn't find the way to acheive this using Calculated Dimension, i tried writing the script, but no luck.Could someone please help me on how to acheive this.

 

ComplaintNoCodeProduct name
CN-1A01P1
CN-1E034P1
CN-1F15P1
CN-2A25J1
CN-2G07J1

Output should be like the below.

ComplaintNoCodeProduct name
CN-1A01;E034;F15P1
CN-2A25;G07J1

entry.title: Use Date input control in a SAC formula to calculate date difference
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I need an help about using a date set in a "Date input control" in a story filter, in a SAC formula

I have this Date input control

I have a model where is present a date dimension called StartingDate

What I need to do is calculate dinamically the day difference between StartingDate and the day set in the date input control.

How can I achieve this?

I tried with a formula calculation of type "Date difference" but I cannot select the date input control.

Anyone can help me?

Thank you so much

Kind regards

entry.title: Does anyone know where I can download compass example model?
entry.content:
In the SAC documentation "Create a Simulation from Compass Start Page" in the Simulation Settings dialog, "select a model", the model selection says, "Compass Example Model".
Does anyone know where I can download this model?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to get the total number of data point comments in the model for Analytic Model?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking to get the total count of data point comments from the model which is present as a separate column in the report table. Is there any way to check the number of comments made?

Model is analytical one with data point comments enabled

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: SAC Live Connection Schedule Publication not working
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a SAC Live connection and enabled everyday publication for some reports, It works everyday but suddenly Its not working. The Error message says, "We couldn't authenticate you. Please make sure the credentials provided for connections are valid"

We haven't change anything, even Production system Password also working. Can anyone please suggest why this error came? and where to check? 

Best Regards

Sathiya

entry.title: SAC - Calculated measure in a hierarchy
entry.content:
Hello community


I'm new here and need some help. Is there a way to make a calculated measure where its multiply the leafs members in a hierarchy? I didn't find any product function to use. Should i make a data action for it?

entry.title: SAC Composites - Retrieve/Update Interface Properties at script level
entry.content:
Is there anyway to access the properties you create for a composite at script level?

I'm only seeing functions we've defined when using COMPOSITE_1.x, and we cant update the properties within the functions themselves when defining the composite. Would make more sense to update the properties that are bindable.

entry.title: 49P scope item, missing sample data for SAC workshop
entry.content:
Hello,

We have activated scope item 49P content, but no sample data is available. The documentation mention that the scope item is delivered with preconfigured story samples. This means that only includes the models but not any data. We really need to connect the SAC starter with S4Hana starter system? 

I'm a little concern that the workshop data will depend on the poor data available in the starter system.

Can you please share your experience?

Kind regards,

Sandra

entry.title: Burst a story using a condition in SAC
entry.content:
I would like to be able to burst a story in SAC based on a condition such as Sales >= 10000. The recipients should get email delivery of the output if the condition is fulfilled. Could anyone suggest how this can be achieved?.

 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Measures sorting
entry.content:
hi all,

what is the best practice to customize the measures order in story?

for example, in the table below, i want to Switch position between the columns "percent" and "Total cost".

entry.title: Scheduling Data Load Jobs in Calendar Task
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working with calendar tasks and need clarification on scheduling data load jobs. Specifically, I would like to know:

  1. Is it possible to schedule, pause, and release the actualization of data load jobs within a calendar task?
  2. Can the calendar task be used to refresh the account dimension and dimension hierarchies automatically?

Any insights or best practices on this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Is Successfactors Stories in context of People Analytics always the "embedded SAC"
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are implementing SF and I try to make sense out (peace with) SAP's idea when it come to analytical and reporting stuff in the SF area.

I skimmed over this "Introducing SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics for Administrators" but am still a little unsure. Is my assumption right that

  1. People Analytics is a broader term, covering (nowadays) most everything that has anything to do with reporting and analytics in the SF area
  2. That "Stories" in the SF People Analytics realm mean that these are predefined stories always living on the embedded SAC that is shipped together with SF
  3. That such stories cannot be properly hosted on an (existing) separate corporate SAC instance
  4. That there are other ares, where the corporate SAC comes into play, such as
    • Workforce Analytics (separate License (on SAC?))
    • "free form" analytical scenarios (like any others) built on the SAC analytical frontend

Many thanks and kind regards

Jens

entry.title: How to loop through all the data in a table and fetch the data point comments?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to fetch all the data point comments that are available in the table. Can anyone please help on how to write the script to achieve this (Need to know at which dimension combinations these comments were mentioned).There are nearly 1000 comments in the model. So I want to get the complete list at which datapoints it is used)

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: OpenID for SAC
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is it possible to configure OpenID Connect for user authentication  (SSO)  between SAC and IAS, when IAS is configured as a proxy ?

Or is SAML 2.0 the only supported and recommended method?

Thank you.

entry.title: All dots (.) become comma (,) if the number format is 1.234,56 in SAC user profile setting
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a very weird situation where if a users is trying to copy some text from SAC to notepad/browser then all dots (.) becomes comma (,).

I have one dimension and one of the attribute is URL which is of text type. User is entering some URL in that attribute. When user is open the report, he is able to see the URL correctly in the table but if he is trying to copy that URL from SAC table to web browser, then all dots (.) become commas (,).

For example, in table it shows as www.google.com but when he copy it to browser it become www,google,com.

In the user profile setting he has number format as 1.234,56 but when he change to 1,234.56 then he is able to copy properly but all his keyfigure change it to UK format which he don't want.

Any solution for this?

Thanks

entry.title: Is there any way for a single user to execute data actions in parallel?
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We built a debt model, and this model has complex data actions that run for many years, until the end of the debt contracts, because of this complexity the execution of these contracts takes a long time, so we thought about the possibility of parallelizing the execution of contracts by company or by type, I didn't find anything about parallelism of Data Actions, is there any possibility to parallelize the execution from a single user?

entry.title: How to display more than 60 measures in R script in SAP Analytics Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello SAC Community!

I'm using R in SAP Analytics Cloud and noticed a limit of 60 measures in a script. Is there a way to bypass this restriction to display more measures?

Thanks!

Adam

entry.title: SAC Performance with Live Query Attribute reduction
entry.content:
Hi, I have built a query for a live data connection in a CDS view. I am now consuming the query via a live data connection and want to increase the performance. I certainly need to reduce the dimensions here. But how do I get the attributes reduced?
For example, do I simply have to comment out the “AnalyticsDetails” in the CDS view:
@AnalyticsDetails.query.display: #KEY_TEXT
ShippingType

Or do I only get the attributes reduced if I reduce the dimensions?
How many dimensions are recommended in a live data model in the SAC? And what should be a target number for the attributes?

How can I see which dimension has the most Attreibute


Greetings Niels

entry.title: SAC - show number of orders for Top 10 revenue customers
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I got a chart Top 10 customers by revenue.

Can I apply this customer ranking to another chart (as filter) somehow? E.g. a chart showing number of orders for the top 10 revenue customers?

When I look at the ranking options auf the number of orders chart I see only the measures included in this chart but not "other" measures of the underlying model. 

Thanks in advance for all replies!

Best regards
Axel

PS: I am using a BW Live model if it matters ... and yes I could build in BW a pre-query filter variable etc. but I was wondering if SAC could handle it somehow as for me it is a common requirement (if I would be biz and not IT)
